name: Buick Model B
description: The first American car to sell over 10,000 units in a single year.

name: Buick Model D
description: Known for its affordability and reliability, the Model D was a popular car in its time.

name: Buick Roadmaster
description: A luxury full-size automobile produced from 1936 to 1942 and again from 1949 to 1987.

name: Buick Skylark
description: A popular personal luxury car produced since 1953 with various generations.

name: Buick Electra 225
description: The longest-produced American car model from 1959 to 1990.

name: Buick Riviera
description: A personal luxury car produced from 1963 to 2005, with a revival in 2016.

name: Buick Century
description: A mid-size car produced from 1975 to 2002.

name: Buick Park Avenue
description: A luxury sedan produced from 1980 to 1999.

name: Buick Lucerne
description: A full-size luxury sedan produced from 2006 to 2011.

name: Buick LaCrosse
description: A full-size luxury sedan produced since 2004.
